revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-350

Oscillation is produced by the superimposition of two oscillations of slightly different frequencies. The amplitude of this oscillation varies periodically with a frequency that is the difference of the frequencies of the two oscillations.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Beat}}
